behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names the affected files (areal/api/cli_args.py, areal/utils/data.py), all classes (NormConfig, PPOActorConfig, BaseExperimentConfig, Normalization), all field names tested, valid/invalid values, and ruff version 0.14.9.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what should be validated and where validation should live, but doesn't dictate exact code/line edits; agent must still implement __post_init__ logic.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check construction-time exceptions (ValueError/TypeError), not specific method names or internal implementation details, so alternative correct fixes would pass.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests instantiate NormConfig, PPOActorConfig, BaseExperimentConfig and assert exceptions; ruff is run as subprocess.

test_not_tautological.reason: A stub would not raise on invalid inputs, failing the assertions that require ValueError/TypeError.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover NormConfig validation (mean_level, std_level, group_size), PPOActorConfig SAPO temps and decoupled_loss conflict, and BaseExperimentConfig total_train_epochs.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped under section header comments (Gates, NormConfig, PPOActorConfig SAPO, BaseExperimentConfig) with descriptive names.

no_typos.reason: Filenames and identifiers are consistent between instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names files/classes (necessary scope) but not specific line numbers; localization within file is left to the agent.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: This is a code task, not an agentmd-edits config task.
